text:
彼こそが我が分身！
孤高にして最高の相棒
その名も、ＳＯＲＯよっ！

鈴来さんを倒したその実力
果たして私達にも通じるかしら！

He's my alter ego! His independence makes
him the best partner. His name is even SORO,
for "solo"! Get it?

Maybe some of the sheer ability he has
that made him able to defeat Aika Suzuki
will rub off on us!
